allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: remove session concept, all clients use same active tab

- Simplify daemon.ts: remove session management, REGISTER/DISCONNECT
- Simplify mcp.ts: remove sessionId, direct REQUEST without registration
- Simplify sidepanel.ts: remove session routing, use active tab only
- Delete session-binding.ts and its test file
- All MCP clients now share the same active browser tab

Closes multi-session architecture in favor of simpler single-tab control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: address code review issues

- daemon.ts: pass socket explicitly to sendToExtension \(fix bug\)
- mcp.ts: remove unused WS_PORT constant
- sidepanel.ts: add error handling for chrome.tabs.create

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
